  "findings": [
    "Missing lockable disconnect within sight of the motor or motor controller, creating an immediate shock and unexpected startup hazard during maintenance."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the motor circuit immediately at the upstream distribution panel.",
    "Lock out and tag out the upstream breaker.",
    "Install a code-compliant, lockable safety switch/disconnect switch within sight of the motor."
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of a lockable disconnect within sight of the motor or its controller violates fundamental safety requirements of NEC Article 430. Because the asset is already in service, this presents a critical safety hazard to maintenance personnel who cannot safely isolate the equipment locally.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.102",
    "NEC Article 430.103"
  ]
}
